rationale: Entire career (3.3 yrs) at TCS in IT services doing cloud/DevOps work with only self-directed AI exposure (online courses, small RAG side project) and no production IR, embedding retrieval, or ranking experience.

Career consists entirely of non-technical roles (graphic design, accounting, marketing, sales, content writing) including two fictional companies (Dunder Mifflin, Stark Industries), with zero ML, IR, or engineering work.
Non-technical career in sales and accounting at Infosys and fictional Wayne Enterprises, with no ML, software engineering, or IR experience of any kind.

Strong data engineering background (7.4 yrs) at product companies PolicyBazaar and Zomato with IIT Kharagpur M.S. ML, but no demonstrated production experience in embeddings, vector search, ranking, or retrieval systems — the core of this role.
14.8-year career entirely in non-technical roles (project management, marketing, sales, content writing) at Wipro and Acme Corp with no engineering or ML work whatsoever.

Solid data engineering background at product companies PhonePe and InMobi with Hugging Face Transformers and TensorFlow experience, but primary ML skills are in CV/speech recognition rather than IR/ranking, and no evidence of production retrieval systems or NDCG/MAP evaluation ownership.
Content writer role at Infosys with a self-described marketing background and no software engineering, ML, or IR experience despite possessing a B.Sc in Artificial Intelligence.

5.2 years of full-stack and QA work entirely at IT-services firms TCS and Mphasis, with only self-learner AI exposure (online courses, OpenAI API) and no production ML, retrieval, or ranking experience.
Non-technical career in sales, project management, and accounting across fictional companies Wayne Enterprises and Stark Industries with no engineering or ML experience and clear honeypot signals.
Career spent entirely in non-technical roles (customer support, HR management, project management, sales) at TCS, Wipro, and Pied Piper with no engineering or ML work of any kind.
